title: UK tightens student visa rules as universities face ban over international student visa abuse
summary_full: UK universities face stricter rules for recruiting international students to combat visa system abuse. New government plans demand higher compliance standards, with tougher targets for visa refusal, enrolment, and course completion rates. Institutions failing to meet these benchmarks risk recruitment restrictions or losing sponsorship licenses, aiming to ensure genuine study purposes.
